ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Setup.Kingsbridge_General_Custom_Setting__c.Validation_Rule__c = False, $User.Alias <> 'IntUser', $User.Alias <> 'guest', OR( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Customer_Opportunity', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Non_Auto_Renewal_Opportunity' ), ISCHANGED(StageName), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Lost'), ISNULL(Policy_End_Date__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: OV2: Policy End Date is required before updating the stage to Closed Lost
